page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.14xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.se1ne family. It features 56 dedicated physical CPU cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. The instance is equipped with 480.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 8.57 GB of RAM per core.

This server operates on the KVM hypervisor. It does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. The baseline network bandwidth is rated at 10 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this instance.

Given the high memory-to-core ratio of over 8 GB per physical core, this instance is positioned as a memory-optimized resource. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention. The absence of local storage and GPU hardware makes it a specialized choice for memory-intensive workloads that rely on network storage, such as large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise applications requiring significant memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.14xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical CPU cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated processing power without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 480.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.57 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage options. The baseline network bandwidth is 10 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications, such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and large-scale data processing tasks that require substantial memory capacity alongside dedicated compute resources.
